chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-362 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 1512/24 3.For hearing of main case 06-11-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Admittedly, the petitioners are civil servants and by means of this constitutional petition have challenged the orders passed by the competent authority against them, which through instant petition are barred under Article 212 of the Constitution. Result thereof, instant petition, being not maintainable, is hereby dismissed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
